creator: yamajun@ofug.net
text:
Changelog:
* Fix GSUB vert table for vertical glyph
* Add one glyph.

http://sourceforge.jp/projects/vlgothic/releases/38942/changelog (in Japanese)

Fix: Apply patch to ports/japanese/vlgothic


Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Display Japanese test contain full-width comma, period, or hyphen as a vertical format.

Example of vertical format: OpenOffice.org Writer with "Text-direction: Right-to-Left(vertical)" mode.
